---
name: Question
about: Ask a clarifying question about a topic in the notes
title: "[Question] "
labels: question
---

## What is your question?

Be specific. Reference the file/section.

## What have you already tried?

E.g., "Read the AWS Well-Architected Reliability pillar whitepaper."

## What is the desired outcome?

A short, direct answer (not a discussion thread).
